goal.objective: Complete V12 first-use runtime purity after revision 3 proved that all four operations reach the Specialist Compiler schema loader through package reconstruction.

assumptions.statement: ADR 0005 and the Specialist Run contract are the complete implementation authority.
assumptions.rationale: Architecture fan-in passed and no blocking decision remains.

assumptions.statement: After native apply_patch fails before mutation, the host may perform an exact precondition-hash-guarded PowerShell write inside the approved scope.
assumptions.rationale: Foundation Revision 1 proved the temporary worktree patch helper is unavailable while bounded escalated PowerShell writes remain auditable and fail closed.

assumptions.statement: All runtime, persistence, Git, merge, and memory effects remain external to core.
assumptions.rationale: V12 is a pure evidence session, not the deferred universal scheduler.

assumptions.statement: Revision 3 is a verified split: its V12 and V11 handoff-loader corrections are preserved, and revision 4 adds only the causally reached Specialist Compiler schema loader.
assumptions.rationale: Every truly cold operation produced the same single common.schema.json read while verifySpecialistPackage reconstructed the compilation through compileAgentBlueprints.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Make create, restore, inspect, and record perform zero filesystem reads during cold package reconstruction while preserving all revision-2 and revision-3 corrections.

evidenceRequirements.description: Provide package and split authentication, exact parity for every bundled schema, an unprimed zero-filesystem-read proof for all four operations, counterordered identity evidence, focused compiler/handoff/run tests, typecheck, build, and resulting-byte bindings.

contextSources.description: Accepted immutable Specialist Run Session decision.
Existing bounded canonical JSON and framed digest primitives.
Existing shared schema definitions consumed by the V11 handoff validator.
Existing package construction and verification fixtures.
Existing public kernel constants and limits.
Existing diagnostic registry and stable operation result helpers.
Focused V12 create, restore, identity, and boundary tests.
Existing Specialist Handoff schema validator pattern.
Revision-3 package-owned common and Specialist Handoff schema data.
Existing closed Specialist Handoff schema pattern.
Existing adversarial package and handoff tests.
Focused V12 inspection tests.
Existing duplicate-aware bounded raw JSON parser.
Existing closed JSON model types.
Existing high-confidence secret detection.
Exact owner approval for the revision-3 package.
Verified revision-3 SPLIT handoff identifying the package-reconstruction schema read.
Owner-approved revision-3 package that produced the package-reconstruction split.
Trace of the revision-2 split and revision-3 scope expansion.
Exact lifecycle/correctness release-review FIX handoff.
Exact security/trace/authority release-review FIX handoff.
Frozen normative Specialist Run contract.
V12 deterministic inspection implementation.
Frozen V12 run-session schema validator.
Revision-2 package-owned V12 run schema data module.
Frozen V12 run-session JSON Schema.
Frozen V12 session creation, restoration, and validation foundation.
V12 handoff transition implementation.
Frozen V12 run-session wire and public types.
Existing defensive JSON snapshot and deep-freeze boundary.
Existing package-bound raw handoff and fan-in implementation.
Existing rendered package verification and manifest resolution.
Existing Specialist Compiler schema validator pattern.
Existing closed Specialist Compiler schema pattern.
Existing V11 compiler, package, and handoff types.
Frozen V12 verification obligations.
Existing control-character and Unicode checks.
Focused V12 transition tests.
Frozen V12 feature specification.

forbiddenEffects: Do not use network access, change Git state, launch descendants, write outside the exact scope, or claim that core performs host effects.

workUnits.objective: Make create, restore, inspect, and record perform zero filesystem reads during cold package reconstruction while preserving all revision-2 and revision-3 corrections.

module.action: Authenticate the revision-3 split, preserve the existing bundled Run and Handoff validators, bundle exact common and Specialist Compiler schema source bytes into a package-owned TypeScript data module, remove Specialist Compiler validator filesystem loading, and make the existing unprimed four-operation and counterordered regressions pass without cache priming.

stopConditions: If native apply_patch fails before mutation because of the host sandbox, an exact precondition-hash-guarded PowerShell write is allowed within the declared write scope; verify the resulting file bytes immediately.
Return only the concrete closed SpecialistAgentHandoff JSON shape from the generated contract.
Run only local focused verification allowed by the contract and report every failing command truthfully.
Stop if any declared source is unavailable or fails its exact digest and byte binding.
Write only the exact declared write scope; do not change Git state, use the network, launch descendants, or widen the public contract.
